title: Generate a form from a text prompt and reach the editor
description: Verifies a user can generate a form using a text prompt, see loading state, and be redirected to the editor with generated fields visible.

steps.description: Type "Create a customer satisfaction survey with 5 questions and one optional email field" into the prompt input

title: Attempt generation with no prompt and no files shows generation error
description: Verifies clicking Generate without providing prompt or files shows the generation error message element on the landing page.

title: Generating a form shows spinner and disables repeated generation (no duplicate requests)
description: Verifies the UI enters a loading state after clicking Generate and does not allow immediate repeated generation clicks while loading.

steps.description: Type "Create an event registration form with name, company, job title, and dietary restrictions" into the prompt input

title: Generated editor contains multiple expected fields from a richer prompt
description: Verifies that a more detailed prompt results in multiple recognizable generated fields visible in the editor after redirect.

steps.description: Type "Create a job application form with full name, email, phone number, portfolio URL, and a short answer question: 'Why do you want this role?'" into the prompt input

title: Owner edits a form field property and saves successfully (redirect to analytics)
description: Verifies an authenticated form owner can edit a field and save, then is redirected to the analytics page showing updated content.

steps.description: Click on the first form in the dashboard list
Click on the "Edit" button or "Edit form" link

title: Owner modifies form title and saves; sees updated header on analytics page
description: Verifies saving changes updates the form and the user lands on the form analytics page with the updated header visible.

steps.description: Click on the first form in the dashboard list
Click on the "Edit" button or "Edit form" link
Type " Updated" into the form title field

title: Owner adds a new field and saves successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated owner can add a new field in the editor and save without errors.

steps.description: Click on the first form in the dashboard list
Click on the "Edit" button or "Edit form" link
Click the "Add field" or "Add new field" button

title: Owner removes an existing field and saves successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated owner can remove a field and save without errors.

steps.description: Click on the first form in the dashboard list
Click on the "Edit" button or "Edit form" link
Click the "Remove field" or trash icon for the first field

title: Non-owner attempts to edit and is denied then redirected to dashboard
description: Verifies a user who does not own the form sees an access denied toast and is redirected back to the dashboard.

steps.description: Click on a form that is marked as not owned (e.g., shows a different owner or shared indicator)
Click on the "Edit" button or "Edit form" link

title: Save is blocked when access denied toast appears
description: Verifies that when access is denied, the user cannot remain in the editor and is taken back to dashboard.

steps.description: Click on a form that is marked as not owned (e.g., shows a different owner or shared indicator)
Click on the "Edit" button or "Edit form" link
Verify text "Access denied: You do not own this form" is visible

title: Editor loads with generated title, description, and fields visible
description: Verifies the editor UI renders the generated form content (title, description, and at least one field).

steps.description: Click on the first form in the dashboard list
Click on the "Edit" button or "Edit form" link

title: Invalid form ID shows Form not found error state
description: Verifies an invalid public form URL shows the styled error message.

steps.description: Verify text "Form not found" is visible

title: From Form not found page, Back to Home returns to landing page
description: Verifies the Back to Home link from the error state navigates to the landing page.

steps.description: Verify text "Form not found" is visible

title: Owner views analytics detail page: metadata, charts, and submissions table are visible
description: Verifies an authenticated owner can see the form metadata, analytics chart area, and submissions table on the dashboard detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first available form card or form row in the dashboard list

title: Owner sees stat cards for total responses and total fields
description: Verifies the dashboard detail page shows stat cards for total responses and total fields for an owner.

steps.description: Click on the first available form card or form row in the dashboard list

title: Owner clicks View Live from dashboard detail and is taken to the public form page
description: Verifies the View Live control is present on the dashboard detail page and navigating from it reaches the public form URL.

steps.description: Click on the first available form card or form row in the dashboard list

title: Owner inspects an individual submission row in the submissions table
description: Verifies the submissions table renders rows (when available) and a row can be opened to inspect its visible details.

steps.description: Click on the first available form card or form row in the dashboard list
Click on the first submission row in the submissions table

title: Chart area renders and shows an empty-state message when there is no chartable data
description: Verifies the analytics chart section shows an empty-state message when chartable fields are missing or there are no submissions to chart.

steps.description: Click on a form card or form row that appears to have no responses (e.g., shows 0 responses if visible on the card/row)
Verify text "No data available yet" is visible

title: Submissions table shows an empty-state message when there are no submissions
description: Verifies the submissions table shows an empty state when a form has no submissions.

steps.description: Click on a form card or form row that appears to have no responses (e.g., shows 0 responses if visible on the card/row)
Verify text "No submissions yet" is visible

title: Analytics page displays response distribution/chart section when data exists
description: Verifies that when a form has responses, the analytics chart section renders a visible distribution/chart area rather than empty state.

steps.description: Click on a form card or form row that appears to have responses (e.g., shows a non-zero responses count if visible on the card/row)
Verify text "No data available yet" is not visible

title: Quiz analytics shows an average score stat when applicable
description: Verifies that for quiz-type forms, an average score statistic is visible on the dashboard detail page.

steps.description: Click on a form card or form row that appears to be a quiz (e.g., labeled as Quiz if visible)
